title: Explore the resort map
description: Preview key locations across Azure Lagoon Resort. Hover over a pin for the name, then click to view details and gallery images.

pins.name: Lagoon Jetty
pins.description: Main arrival point with concierge welcome and quick ferry access.

images.caption: Guests are welcomed here before check-in.

pins.name: Lagoon Spa
pins.description: Wellness pavilion for sunrise treatments and evening rituals.

images.caption: Ocean-facing wellness rooms and quiet lounges.

pins.name: Sunset Dining Deck
pins.description: Signature dinner spot for golden-hour meals over the water.

images.caption: Chef-led dinners with panoramic lagoon views.

pins.name: Lagoon Suite
pins.description: Lagoon-facing suite with private deck and sunrise view.
